defect: spoil pile within 2 ft of edge
prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Trench protection, part of the Sitework & Utilities scope. The observed field condition is: spoil pile within 2 ft of edge. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: OSHA 1926 Subpart P. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Trench protection (commercial project)
